classification.signal: install finalization collapsed existing paired and merely registered hosts into one manual pairing branch

fix.type: minimal production fix with regression coverage

commands.name: test-targeted
commands.command: pnpm --filter @happytg/bootstrap exec tsx --test --test-name-pattern "auto-requests a pairing code|refreshes the pairing code automatically|reuses an already paired existing host|keeps pairing blocked|probe is unavailable" src/install.runtime.test.ts

notes: Installer automation now probes backend host status only to classify reuse vs refresh; it does not move the Telegram claim boundary.
A follow-up verifier finding required one extra regression test for the existing-host probe-unavailable manual fallback branch.
Fresh verifier rerun concluded AC1-AC6 are satisfied after the added coverage.
